system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_tonkho_sum_dauky","body":"

CREATE PROC [dbo].[TR_TONKHO_SUM_DAUKY]
(
	 @date date 
)
AS
BEGIN
	DECLARE @nam int = YEAR(@DATE)
	DECLARE @thang int = MONTH(@DATE);

	SELECT mavt, thang, soluong, groupType,
		SUM(soluong) OVER (PARTITION BY mavt ORDER BY thang desc) as tonkho_dauky
	INTO #NXT
	FROM (
		SELECT mavt, 99 AS thang, soluong, 'TON' as groupType
		FROM tr_tonkho_sum 
		UNION ALL
		SELECT B.mavt, MONTH(A.ngaynhap) AS thang, -(SUM(B.slnhap+B.soluong_du)) AS tongnhap, 'NHAP' AS groupType
		FROM tr_phieunhap A
			INNER JOIN tr_ctphieunhap B ON A.sopn = B.sopn
		WHERE A.active = 1
			AND YEAR(A.ngaynhap) = @nam 
			AND MONTH(A.ngaynhap) >= @Thang
		GROUP BY B.mavt, MONTH(a.ngaynhap)
		UNION ALL
		SELECT B.mact, MONTH(A.ngaytao) AS thang, SUM(B.soluong) AS tongxuat, 'XUAT' as groupType
		FROM tr_phieuxuat A
			INNER JOIN tr_ctphieuxuat B ON A.sopx = B.phieuxuat
		WHERE A.active = 1 
			AND YEAR(A.ngaytao) = @nam 
			AND MONTH(A.ngaytao) >= @Thang
		GROUP BY B.mact, MONTH(A.ngaytao)
	) A

	DELETE tr_tonkho_theoky2
	WHERE YEAR(ngaythang) = @nam AND MONTH(ngaythang) >= @thang

	INSERT INTO tr_tonkho_theoky2(ngaythang, mavt, soluong_dauky, soluong_nhap, soluong_xuat)
	SELECT ngaythang = DATEFROMPARTS(@nam, thang, 1),
		mavt, 
		tonkho_dauky,
		tongnhap = ISNULL(NHAP, 0), 
		tongxuat = ISNULL(XUAT, 0)
		--tonkho_cuoiky = tonkho_dauky + ISNULL(NHAP, 0) - ISNULL(XUAT, 0)
	FROM (
		SELECT A.mavt, B.mota, B.quycach, B.mausac, thang, 
			ABS(soluong) AS soluong, tonkho_dauky, groupType 
		FROM #NXT A INNER JOIN tr_material B ON A.mavt = B.mavt
		WHERE A.groupType NOT IN ('TON')
	) AS T
	PIVOT (
		SUM(soluong)
		FOR groupType IN ([NHAP], [XUAT])
	) as PT 
	--WHERE mavt = 'BT0178'
	ORDER BY thang, mavt

	DROP TABLE #NXT;

END","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.tr_ctphieunhap","dbo.tr_ctphieuxuat","dbo.tr_material","dbo.tr_phieunhap","dbo.tr_phieuxuat","dbo.tr_tonkho_sum"],"writesTables":["dbo.tr_tonkho_theoky2"],"flags":["has-group-by","has-window","has-temp-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
